title: EVANGELION x BEAMS T
wikitext:
[]: EVANGELION x BEAMS T             Quote Post by XX » Sun Jan 20, 2008 5:15 pm Collaboration between GAINAX (or ©GAINAX/Project Eva related subsidiaries) and the fashion products company BEAMS , concretely his specialized brand in artists designed T-shirts, BEAMS T . This project was created with ocassion of the 10th anniversary of 'Neon Genesis Evangelion', and now they have released a new one T-shirt design, entitled「BLOOD RAIN」, that is added to the other four previously released, all made by artist Tsuyoshi Hirooka : EVANGELION×BEAMS T コラボＴシャツ第３弾、登場!! - GAINAX.NET [url]http://www.gainax.co.jp/anime/eva/news/0151.html[/url] _____ · EVANGELION × BEAMS T / Blood Rain - BEAMS T OFFICIAL WEB STORE [url]http://www.beamst.com/cgi/item_detail.php3?qId=75-04-0352-191&qLang=en[/url] _____ EVANGELION × BEAMS T / Ayanami - BEAMS T OFFICIAL WEB STORE [url]http://www.beamst.com/cgi/item_detail.php3?qId=75-04-1997-191&qLang=en[/url] EVANGELION × BEAMS T / Anti H.I.P. - BEAMS T OFFICIAL WEB STORE [url]http://www.beamst.com/cgi/item_detail.php3?qId=75-04-1767-191&qLang=en[/url] EVANGELION × BEAMS T / I mustn't run away - BEAMS T OFFICIAL WEB STORE [url]http://www.beamst.com/cgi/item_detail.php3?qId=75-04-1766-191&qLang=en[/url] EVANGELION × BEAMS T / 0:00:00 - BEAMS T OFFICIAL WEB STORE [url]http://www.beamst.com/cgi/item_detail.php3?qId=75-04-1996-191&qLang=en[/url] BEAMS T OFFICIAL WEB STORE ships products to Australia, Belgium, Canada, Denmark, France, Finland, Germany, Hong Kong, Italy, Netherlands, New Zealand, Singapore, South Korea, Spain, Sweden, Taiwan, UK and USA. · BEAMS T OFFICIAL WEB STORE [url]http://www.beamst.com/beams_ten/beamst.html[/url] · BEAMS English WEB SITE [url]http://www.beams.co.jp/beams_e/[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Jan 20, 2008 5:22 pm Nice find. I could definitely go for some of those. Particularly the red Eva-01 and the black Rei shirts.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Jan 20, 2008 5:24 pm I WANT ONE!

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Mon Jan 21, 2008 6:15 pm Alllllllll mineeeee precious

[]:             Quote Post by honsou » Mon Jan 21, 2008 11:11 pm HOLY CRAP, I WANT THAT "I mustn't run away' T-SHIRT NOW!

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Thu Jan 24, 2008 5:03 pm I like the Ayanami one. And the "I musn't run away" is pretty cool too.

[]:             Quote Post by jenova7 » Thu Jan 24, 2008 6:25 pm well there goes my savings again
